title: Sub-tasks are no longer expanding
excerpt: Recently  have run into an issue where the sub-task feature will no longer expand the entries. When the user attempts to expand previously entered items, the items the spinner just continually spins

posts.author: Charlesg100 (Charles Gore)
posts.cookedHtml: Recently have run into an issue where the sub-task feature will no longer expand the entries. When the user attempts to expand previously entered items, the items the spinner just continually spins
